title: Marco De Luca — Brand designer & art director
description: T662 / T74 dogfood: structural mirror of marcodeluca.me as a Forge CmsPage. Phase 1 = HTML+CSS skeleton. Phases 2-3 (interactivity + animation, visual diff) tracked in FORGE_ANIMATION_GAPS.md.

sections.title: Crafting brands that move people
sections.lede: Independent designer working with founders and agencies on identity systems, art direction, and end-to-end brand experiences for music, fashion, and consumer tech.

sections.title: GAP-T662-1 — kinetic-type hero
body: The original landing presents the headline as a 3-line kinetic typography rig: each word animates in with a custom split-letter mask + a per-character rotation easing curve. Hovering any word flips its color + drops a subtle drop-shadow on adjacent words.

Forge has no typography-animation primitive. The Hero variant above degrades gracefully to static text. A CmsSection::KineticTitle { words: Vec<KineticWord>, easing: TimingCurve, on_hover: HoverEffect } variant is queued (T70 sub-task).

sections.title: GAP-T662-2 — case-study cards with hover video preview
body: The original site replaces the card cover image with an autoplaying muted video on hover (per-card mp4, lazy-loaded, ≤2.4 MB). Forge's CardFeed has no media-on-hover affordance — the Phase 1 mirror uses letter avatars as placeholders.

Adding CmsCard.hover_video: Option<HoverVideoSpec> with size budgets and a preload strategy field is queued. Without it the lazy-load + decode path needs to live in JS the runtime injects on `mouseenter` — possibly via the T432 dynamic_runtime that just landed.

items.value: Brand identity, art direction, packaging, motion direction
Brand New, Awwwards, FWA, It's Nice That, Type Directors Club
Pentagram, Sagmeister & Walsh, Apple Music, Spotify, Vogue Italia

sections.title: GAP-T662-3 — scroll-pinned visual marquee
body: Below About, the original has a horizontally-scrolling client-logo marquee that pins to the viewport for ~120vh of vertical scroll, with logos sweeping past at parallax-coupled speed. Forge has no scroll-coupled animation primitive. A CmsSection::ScrollMarquee { items, pin_height_vh, speed_multiplier } variant is queued.

Adjacent gap: the marquee items use brand SVG logos at varied aspect ratios. loom-icons currently only ships abstract UI glyphs. A CmsSection::LogoWall { items: Vec<BrandLogo> } variant — also surfaced by the T660 Stripe rebuild — would feed it.

sections.title: Get in touch
body: I take on 4-6 brand engagements per year. Booking inquiries: hello@marcodeluca.me
I respond within 48 hours during business days. For agency collaboration, please include rough scope, timeline, and budget bracket.

sections.text: Phase-1 structural mirror only — no animation. Phases 2+3 (interactivity + visual diff) tracked in FORGE_ANIMATION_GAPS.md.
